meta.title: What's Wrong with the Proposed Nuclear Deal with Iran?
meta.description: Lee Smith joins Michael Doran, Matthew Kroenig, and David Samuels on the implications of the in-progress nuclear deal with Iran. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
